webSearch.baseUrl.label: SearXNG Base URL
webSearch.baseUrl.help: Base URL of your self-hosted SearXNG instance (e.g., http://localhost:5000). No API key required.

webSearch.count.label: Result Count
webSearch.count.help: Default number of search results (1–100, default: 10).

webSearch.lang.label: Language
webSearch.lang.help: Language code for results (e.g., en, de, fr). Default: en.
